creator: peo@nethead.se
text: "Host not found" appears and disappears intermittently, unfortunately more off- than online. No DNS problem, server works ok with browser access. If one searches you will see that the "Host not found" error is not confined to FreeBSD but I thought I would just check if someone here had a solution. Restart sometimes will resume sync, likewise do "No proxy" -> "Use system Proxy" and back to "No proxy". Problem is present over several versions of FreeBSD and Qt.
